title: Reduce single-stock concentration over six months
proposal_summary: Advisor team is considering a staged reduction of a concentrated listed-equity holding and reallocating proceeds across diversified income-oriented funds, subject to suitability and tax review.
intended_outcome: Lower concentration risk while preserving retirement-income planning flexibility.
known_open_questions: Tax impact of selling the concentrated position
Exact liquidity needed for renovation timing

title: Diversification scenarios for founder wealth
proposal_summary: Advisor team is exploring scenarios that gradually diversify liquid assets while acknowledging the client's private-company exposure and possible relocation.
intended_outcome: Build a more diversified long-term portfolio without creating unmanaged tax or reporting issues.
